title: Knysna honours top matriculants' academic excellence
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Academic excellence took centre stage last week as the Knysna Muni-cipality hosted its first-ever Matriculants Achievement Ceremony at Knysna High School, formally recognising the town's top-performing matriculants.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Academic excellence took centre stage last week as the Knysna Muni-cipality hosted its first-ever Matriculants Achievement Ceremony at Knysna High School, formally recognising the town's top-performing matriculants."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event brought together learners of Percy Mdala High, Concordia High, Knysna High, Knysna Secondary and the Montessori School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This ceremony is dedicated to the class of 2025,\" said Mayor Thando Matika, who emphasised the importance of acknowledging hard work and perseverance among young people.","html":"\"This ceremony is dedicated to the class of 2025,\" said Mayor Thando Matika, who emphasised the importance of acknowledging hard work and perseverance among young people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each school's top matric achiever received a cash award of R5 000, while the overall top achiever was awarded an additional R10 000.","html":"Each school's top matric achiever received a cash award of R5 000, while the overall top achiever was awarded an additional R10 000."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The top performer for 2025 was Kate Oosthuizen of Knysna High School, who achieved seven distinctions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oosthuizen said she was surprised by the recognition and deeply grateful for the support she received throughout her schooling.","html":"Oosthuizen said she was surprised by the recognition and deeply grateful for the support she received throughout her schooling."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I had huge support from the teachers and the school and the principal. Everyone at Knysna High is amazing,\" she said.","html":"\"I had huge support from the teachers and the school and the principal. Everyone at Knysna High is amazing,\" she said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She plans to use the prize money to help her parents cover university expenses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event was made possible through several partnerships.","html":"The event was made possible through several partnerships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Standard Bank assisted by opening bank accounts for the award recipients on site, while Creative Designs Studio contributed trophies, programmes and certificates, and donated binding machines to all participating schools.","html":"Standard Bank assisted by opening bank accounts for the award recipients on site, while Creative Designs Studio contributed trophies, programmes and certificates, and donated binding machines to all participating schools."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Representatives from the Western Cape Education Department, school principals, educators, school governing bodies, parents and community leaders were also in attendance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Principals were specifically acknowledged by the mayor for their often unseen leadership and accountability, noting that they operate \"under immense pressure\".","html":"Principals were specifically acknowledged by the mayor for their often unseen leadership and accountability, noting that they operate \"under immense pressure\"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality reaffirmed its commit-ment to investing in young people. \"Even in difficult times, it is important that we come together and celebrate our learners,\" said Matika."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality confirmed that the Matriculants Achievement Ceremony will become an annual event, aimed at uplifting and inspiring future generations of Knysna learners.","html":"The municipality confirmed that the Matriculants Achievement Ceremony will become an annual event, aimed at uplifting and inspiring future generations of Knysna learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The top performing matriculants of 2025 from each school were recognised at the Matriculant Achievement Ceremony.","html":"The top performing matriculants of 2025 from each school were recognised at the Matriculant Achievement Ceremony."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["NSC and IEB 2025 results impress"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
